messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
please give me some shades of blue (but them in a table withtheir hexa values)

Sure! Here are some common shades of blue along with their corresponding hex values:

| Blue Shade | Hex Value |
|------------|-----------|
| Navy Blue  | #000080   |
| Royal Blue | #4169E1   |
| Baby Blue  | #89CFF0   |
| Sky Blue   | #87CEEB   |
| Teal Blue  | #008080   |
| Turquoise  | #40E0D0   |
| Steel Blue | #4682B4   |

Please note that there are numerous shades of blue, and this is just a small selection.
whats the most bright one of them?
The most bright shade of blue among the ones listed is "Baby Blue." It has the hex value #89CFF0.
whats the most lite one of them ?
The most light shade of blue among the ones listed is "Sky Blue." It has the hex value #87CEEB.
